title: Earn Double-Digit Income With Options (October 2023)
text: We explain why selling cash-covered puts and covered calls are relatively safe choices for earning a high income. We will discuss how to formulate a sustainable and repeatable options income strategy. In this monthly series, we present how to go about selecting the right kind of stocks for options income. We present two lists of 10 stocks with multiple scenarios: PUT options, CALL options, and deep-in-the-money CALL options.

title: U.S. Steelmakers Paint Tepid Q3 Picture as Steel Prices Retreat
text: While U.S. steelmakers are seeing firm demand across major end markets, lower steel prices are expected to be a drag on their third-quarter performance.

title: Steel Dynamics (STLD) Sees Lower Q3 Steel Operation Earnings
text: Steel Dynamics (STLD) expects lower earnings in the third quarter of 2023 due to declining metal spreads, reduced steel prices, and challenges in recycling and fabrication operations.

title: Steel Dynamics Provides Third Quarter 2023 Earnings Guidance
text: FORT WAYNE, Ind. , Sept. 18, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Steel Dynamics, Inc. (NASDAQ/GS: STLD) today provided third quarter 2023 earnings guidance in the range of $3.46 to $3.50 per diluted share.

title: Analyzing Steel Dynamics' Dividend Growth Potential
text: Steel Dynamics (STLD) is the featured stock in August's Dividend Growth Stocks Model Portfolio.
